findings.description: Section s1 merges 5 distinct h2 source sections into a single knowledge section: (1) ファイルアップロード画面の作成方法（JSP）, (2) アップロードファイルの取得方法（サーバサイド）, (3) アップロードファイルの保存方法, (4) アップロードファイルを読み込む方法, (5) アップロードファイルをDBに登録する方法. Each h2 section covers a distinct implementation topic with its own code example. The automated check (S9) detected source headings 6 > knowledge sections 5, consistent with this merging. The h3 subsections under section 5 are correctly split into s2–s5, but sections 1–4 should each be their own knowledge section.
findings.source_evidence: Source contains 5 h2 (===) headings each with independent code examples. Knowledge file has only 1 section (s1) for all 5 h2 topics.

findings.description: Section s1 is missing PascalCase class names that appear in its code examples: `MessageUtil` (used in error throw), `MessageLevel` (enum used with MessageUtil), and `UserInfoTempEntity` (formClass passed to validateWith in DB registration example).
findings.source_evidence: Source code: `MessageUtil.createMessage(MessageLevel.ERROR, "MSG00039")` in the getPart error handling block; `UserInfoTempEntity.class` passed to `.validateWith(UserInfoTempEntity.class, "validateRegister")`.
